1.name: Augmented Power
1.description: Your next augment is one tier higher.

1.name: Pandora's Items
1.description:
Round start: items on your bench are randomized. 

Gain 1 random component.

1.name: Size Matters
1.description: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion starts combat with more than null max Health, gain a Warmog's Armor.

1.name: Team Building
1.description:
Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after 5 player combats.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

2.name: Big Grab Bag
2.description:
Gain 3 random components, 2 gold, and 1 Reforger. 

Reforgers allow you to remake any item.

2.name: Pandora's Items II
2.description:
Round start: items on your bench are randomized.

Gain 2 random components.

2.name: Portable Forge
2.description:
Choose 1 of 4 Artifacts.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

2.name: Exclusive Customization
2.description:
Gain a Lucky Item Chest, a Magnetic Remover, and 7 gold.

Use a Lucky Item Chest on a champion to choose from an armory of recommended items!

2.name: Replication
2.description: Choose 1 of 3 components. For the next 2 rounds, gain a copy of that component.

2.name: Second Wind II
2.description: After 10 seconds of combat, your team heals 60% of their missing Health.

2.name: Solo Plate
2.description: Gain a Gargoyle Stoneplate. Combat start: Allies holding Gargoyle Stoneplate gain 17% max Health if they're the only one in their row.

2.name: U.R.F
2.description: Gain a Spatula. Champions holding Spatula or Frying Pan items gain 20% Attack Speed and 3 Mana Regen.

2.name: A Magic Roll
2.description:
Roll 3 dice. Gain rewards based on their total.

Reward:

2.name: Ascension
2.description: After 12 seconds of combat, your team gains 35% Damage Amp.

2.name: Healing Orbs II
2.description: When an enemy dies, the nearest ally is healed for 575.

2.name: Heroic Grab Bag++
2.description:
Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 14 gold.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

2.name: Indiscriminate Killer
2.description: Gain a Giant Slayer. Giant Slayers gain their Damage Amp against all enemies instead of just Tanks.

2.name: Jeweled Lotus I
2.description: Your team gains 10% Critical Strike Chance and Precision.

2.name: ReinFOURcement
2.description: The next 4-cost champion you buy with gold is instantly upgraded to 2-star. Gain 7 gold.

2.name: Trade Sector
2.description: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain 2 gold.

2.name: You Have My Bow
2.description: Gain a Recurve Bow. Your team gains 12% Attack Speed.

2.name: Anima Commander
2.description: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by 5.

2.name: Booster Pack
2.description:
Gain 12 gold of random champions. (At least one 3-cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

2.name: Booster Pack+
2.description:
Gain 18 gold of random champions. (At least one 4-cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

2.name: Charge Transfer II
2.description: Your team gains 10% Damage Amp. 80% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

2.name: Duo Queue
2.description: Gain 2 random 5-cost champions and 2 copies of a random component.

2.name: Explosive Growth+
2.description: Now and at the start of the next 3 rounds, gain 10 XP.

2.name: Gilded Steel
2.description:
Gain 2 non-Tank 5-cost champions. If you field at least one 5-cost champion, your 1 to 4-cost champions gain 8% Durability.

K.O. Coliseum Tactician's Crown, 2025

2.name: Heroic Grab Bag
2.description:
Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 5 gold.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

2.name: Heroic Grab Bag+
2.description:
Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 8 gold.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

2.name: Mace's Will
2.description: Gain a Sparring Gloves. Your team gains 25% Critical Strike Chance.

2.name: Patient Study
2.description: After player combat, gain 2 XP if you won or 3 XP if you lost.

2.name: Salvage Bin+
2.description: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after 4 player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

2.name: Speedy Double Kill
2.description:
Gain a Guinsoo's Rageblade. When 2 players are eliminated, gain 40 gold.

Fates Championship, 2021

2.name: Sunfire Board
2.description: Combat Start: Burn all enemies for 18% of their max Health over 18 seconds and reduce healing received by 33%.

2.name: Worth the Wait
2.description:
Gain a random 1-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.

Champion:

2.name: Aura Farming
2.description: Gain a 2-star 5-cost champion holding a recommended item. You cannot field it until Stage 4-3.

2.name: Savings Account
2.description:
After you earn 50 gold in interest, gain 25 gold. Your max interest is increased to 7. Gain 2 gold now.

Gold earned:

2.name: Spreading Roots
2.description: Gain 2 random Emblems and 1 gold.

3.name: Baron's Lair
3.description:
Gain a random Tank item. After 8 seconds of combat, your team gains 5% bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.

TFT Paris Open, 2025

3.name: Call to Chaos
3.description:
Gain a powerful and random reward.

Reward:

3.name: Soul Awakening
3.description: Combat start: Your team gains 1.5% Attack Damage and Ability Power per second for 10 seconds. At max stacks, deal 12% bonus true damage.

3.name: New Recruit+
3.description: Gain +1 max team size and 2 four-cost champions.

3.name: Pandora's Items III
3.description:
Round start: items on your bench are randomized. 

Gain 1 random Radiant item.

3.name: Belt Overflow
3.description: Gain 4 Giant's Belts. Your Giant's Belts grant +85 bonus Health.

3.name: Commerce Core
3.description: Gain 16 free Shop rerolls now and 3 every round for the rest of the game.

3.name: Golden Gamble++
3.description: Gain 6 gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain 2 Completed item anvils.

3.name: Invested+
3.description: Gain 26 gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every 10 gold above 50 (max 80 gold).

3.name: Invested++
3.description: Gain 40 gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every 10 gold above 50 (max 80 gold).

3.name: Jeweled Lotus II
3.description: Your team gains 25% Critical Strike Chance, 10% Critical Strike Damage, and Precision.

3.name: Prismatic Ticket
3.description: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a 45% chance to gain a free reroll.

3.name: Urf's Grab Bag
3.description: Gain 1 Spatula, 3 random components, and 5 gold.
